prompt: Flip the logo to a mirror-image and fill it with animated soundwave bars.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Horizontally flip the green Spotify logo on the left side of the image to create a mirror image. Within this flipped logo, replace the existing curved lines with dynamic soundwave bars, resembling an active audio equalizer display.
objects: White text "DCFC Podcast, Now available on Spotify"
Green Spotify logo on the left (horizontally flipped)
Dynamic soundwave bars (resembling an active audio equalizer display, within the flipped green Spotify logo)
Curved lines within the Spotify logo (should not be present)
